name: My Swedish Meatloaf or Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix oats and milk; add eggs and beat.
2. Pour the mixture over the meat and mix well.
3. Saute onion in margarine until tender.
4. Add the sauted onion to the meat mixture.
5. Combine dry ingredients: garlic powder, nutmeg, sage, salt, and mustard powder.
6. Mix the dry ingredients into the meat mixture.
7. As a loaf, bake at 350°F for 1-1/4 to 1-1/2 hours.
8. As meatballs, form the mixture into balls, brown in the pan, and transfer to a plate.
9. Make sauce with leftover pan drippings and mushroom soup.
10. Serve with mashed potatoes.
